personal.name: Krishna Goyal
personal.title: Backend Developer | AI Engineer | Flutter Developer
personal.headline: Building intelligent software that solves real-world problems.

status.availability: Open to internships and software engineering opportunities

about.summary: I am a Computer Science undergraduate passionate about building scalable backend systems, AI-powered applications, and modern cross-platform mobile apps. I enjoy solving real-world problems through software and continuously explore emerging technologies including Agentic AI, Large Language Models, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and cloud-based architectures.
about.mission: To build intelligent products that solve real-world problems while continuously improving as a software engineer.

experience.description: Worked as a Web Developer Intern, developing scalable web and mobile applications while collaborating on production-ready software.
responsibilities: Developed a Business Listing Website similar to Yelp and Justdial.
Built scalable REST APIs using FastAPI.
Worked with MongoDB for database management.
Currently building a Flutter Business Listing mobile application.
Collaborated with the team to deliver production-ready software.

projects.name: AI Resume Analyzer
projects.description: An AI-powered resume analysis platform that evaluates resumes against job descriptions, provides ATS compatibility scoring, identifies missing skills, and generates personalized recommendations using Agentic AI workflows.
projects.problem: Job seekers often struggle to understand why their resumes are rejected by Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) or how well they match a specific job description.
projects.solution: Developed an intelligent resume analysis platform that compares resumes with job descriptions, calculates ATS compatibility, identifies missing skills, and provides AI-generated improvement suggestions.
highlights: Uses LLM reasoning instead of simple keyword matching.

projects.name: JobGuard AI
projects.description: An AI-powered fake job detection platform that analyzes job postings and predicts whether they are legitimate or fraudulent.
projects.problem: Job seekers often encounter fraudulent job postings that lead to scams.
projects.solution: Built an explainable machine learning application capable of detecting fake job listings while explaining every prediction.

projects.name: Business Listing Website
projects.description: A production-ready business directory platform similar to Yelp and Justdial.

projects.name: Business Listing Mobile App
projects.description: Cross-platform Flutter application for discovering businesses with modern UI and seamless backend integration.

projects.name: PyClimaExplorer
projects.description: Interactive climate analytics dashboard developed during HackItOut 2026 for analyzing NetCDF climate datasets.

workshops: IIT Delhi AI & Machine Learning Workshop
highlights: Completed a professional software development internship.
Strong passion for solving real-world engineering problems.

career_goals.short_term: Secure a Software Engineering internship or full-time opportunity focused on Backend Development, Artificial Intelligence, or Full Stack Engineering.
career_goals.long_term: Become a Backend Engineer specializing in AI-powered systems, scalable cloud architectures, and intelligent software products.

personality.working_style: I enjoy building complete software products from idea to deployment. I believe in writing maintainable code, designing scalable architectures, continuously learning modern technologies, and creating software that solves real-world problems.

faq.question: Who is Krishna Goyal?
faq.answer: Krishna Goyal is a Computer Science undergraduate specializing in Backend Development, Artificial Intelligence, Flutter Development, and Full Stack Engineering. He enjoys building intelligent software that solves real-world problems.

faq.question: What technologies does Krishna specialize in?
faq.answer: Krishna specializes in FastAPI, Python, React, Flutter, MongoDB, Firebase, Machine Learning, LangGraph, Google Gemini API, TypeScript, and AI-powered application development.

faq.question: What is Krishna currently working on?
faq.answer: Krishna is currently developing a Flutter Business Listing application while continuously improving his expertise in Backend Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, System Design, and Cloud Technologies.

faq.question: What kind of opportunities is Krishna looking for?
faq.answer: Krishna is actively looking for Backend Engineering, AI Engineering, Full Stack Development, Software Engineering, and Flutter Development internship or entry-level opportunities.

faq.question: What is AI Resume Analyzer?
faq.answer: AI Resume Analyzer is an Agentic AI application that evaluates resumes against job descriptions, calculates ATS compatibility, identifies missing skills, and provides AI-powered personalized improvement suggestions using Large Language Models.

faq.question: Which project is Krishna most proud of?
faq.answer: Krishna's flagship projects include AI Resume Analyzer, JobGuard AI, Business Listing Platform, and PyClimaExplorer. These projects demonstrate expertise in AI, backend development, mobile development, and full-stack engineering.

faq.question: Does Krishna have experience with Agentic AI?
faq.answer: Yes. Krishna has built multiple Agentic AI applications using LangGraph and Google Gemini API, including AI Resume Analyzer and JobGuard AI, where intelligent multi-step reasoning workflows are used to deliver context-aware responses.

chatbot_rules.tone: Professional, friendly, confident, concise, and helpful.
chatbot_rules.if_unknown: If the requested information is unavailable, politely mention that the information is not currently available instead of making assumptions.
